message:
feat(core): adaptive Tantivy commit/merge policy with load regime tuning (wa-oegrb.4.3)

Implements index tuning configuration for the flight recorder's lexical index:
- LoadRegime classification (idle/steady/burst/overload) with event rate thresholds
- CommitPolicy: doc/byte/time-based commit triggers per regime
- MergePolicyConfig: strategy selection (LogMerge/Aggressive/Conservative/NoMerge)
- MergePolicyEvaluator: segment health assessment with skew/deletion detection
- CommitTracker: stateful commit decision tracking with ForceCommit/Commit/Hold
- AdaptivePolicyController: lock-free event rate counter with regime auto-switching
- SegmentHealthSnapshot: index segment diagnostics

45 tests covering all components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
